targetKeyword: get more Google reviews for barbers

seo.title: Barber Shop Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for barbers: text a link after the cut, hear complaints privately first, send happy clients to Google. Free, no credit card.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Barber Shops
hero.subheading: Your regulars walk out fresh and still don’t tap five stars. ReviewFlo follows up after they leave—no awkward ask in the chair.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Barber Shop Faces

items.heading: Chair time is loud and fast—reviews aren’t on their mind
items.body: They’re out the door thinking about the rest of their day, not your Google listing.

items.heading: One bad review sits where new walk-ins look
items.body: A single frustrated client can shape what strangers see before they ever sit down.

items.heading: You don’t want to break the vibe to beg for stars
items.body: The cut and conversation matter; stopping to pitch reviews can feel wrong.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Barber Shops

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the appointment
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when they’re checking out.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they message you instead of posting publicly.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Keeps the shop vibe intact
items.body: Requests go out after the cut, not mid-conversation.

items.heading: Catches issues before they hit Google
items.body: Unhappy clients can tell you directly so you can make it right.

items.heading: Works for walk-ins and regulars
items.body: Send the same link every time, whether it’s a new client or a weekly regular.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Will asking for reviews make me look desperate?
items.a: Not when it’s a short text after they leave and they can ignore it. You’re not cornering anyone in the chair.

items.q: What if a client leaves a bad review?
items.a: ReviewFlo still sends everyone the same flow. If they’re upset, many will use private feedback first—but anyone can still post on Google if they choose to.

items.q: Does this work with my booking software?
items.a: You can send requests manually after each cut, or use the API to hook into booking tools you already use.

items.q: What happens if someone is unhappy?
items.a: They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going straight to Google.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same core flow for review requests and private feedback. ReviewFlo is priced for small shops.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Barber Shop Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first request goes out in under 5 minutes.
